section.heading: Art. 83. Malingering
section.chapeau: Any person subject to this chapter who, with the intent to avoid work, duty, or service—

paragraph.content: feigns illness, physical disablement, mental lapse, or mental derangement; or

section.continuation: shall be punished as a court-martial may direct.
section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 114–328, div. E, title LX, § 5404, Dec. 23, 2016, 130 Stat. 2940.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 883 was renumbered section 904a of this title.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective on Jan. 1, 2019, as designated by the President, with implementing regulations and provisions relating to applicability to various situations, see section 5542 of Pub. L. 114–328 and Ex. Ord. No. 13825, set out as notes under section 801 of this title.
